# Machinen

> Move a running VM between hosts. The whole VM keeps running on the other host. All processes, all memory, all open files, all timers.

Machinen is a native arm64 microVM runtime. Snapshot a running VM on one machine, restore it on another; every process inside picks up where it left off, with memory, file descriptors, and timers intact. Branch a running VM with `fork` to get two identical copies running side by side. Node.js is the first-class target; anything else that boots in a Linux VM works too. Machinen doesn't run Docker images or OCI bundles — you build the VM in TypeScript via `provision()`.

The runtime source is not yet published. The companion website source is at https://github.com/redwoodjs/machinen.dev.

## Install

```bash
pnpm add @machinen/cli @machinen/runtime
```

## Snapshot, restore, fork

**SDK**

```ts
import { boot, restore } from "@machinen/runtime";

const vm = await boot({ image: "./agent.tar.gz" });
await vm.snapshot({ outDir: "./agent.snap" });
const restored = await restore({ snapDir: "./agent.snap" });
const child = await vm.fork({ name: "agent-b" });
```

**CLI**

```bash
$ machinen boot ./agent.tar.gz --name agent --detached
$ machinen snapshot agent ./agent.snap
$ machinen restore ./agent.snap
$ machinen fork agent --new-name agent-b --detach
```

## Provision (no Docker / OCI)

**SDK** (`bake.ts`)

```ts
import { provision } from "@machinen/runtime";

await provision({
  install: async (vm) => {
    await vm.exec("apt-get install -y nodejs");
    await vm.writeFile("/opt/agent.mjs", code);
  },
  cmd: ["node", "/opt/agent.mjs"],
  out: "./agent.tar.gz",
});
```

**CLI**

```bash
$ node bake.ts
```

## Mount (live, bidirectional)

**SDK**

```ts
const vm = await boot({
  image: "./agent.tar.gz",
  liveMounts: [{ host: "./src", guest: "/mnt/src" }],
});
```

**CLI**

```bash
$ machinen boot ./agent.tar.gz --mount-live ./src:/mnt/src
```

## Forward ports

**SDK**

```ts
const vm = await boot({
  image: "./agent.tar.gz",
  portForward: [
    { hostPort: 3000, guestPort: 3000 },
    { hostPort: 8080, guestPort: 80 },
  ],
});
```

**CLI**

```bash
$ machinen boot ./agent.tar.gz -p 3000:3000 -p 8080:80
```

## Run code, write files

**SDK**

```ts
await vm.exec("apt-get install -y python3");
await vm.writeFile("/etc/agent.conf", config);
const { stdout } = await vm.exec("ls /opt");
```

**CLI**

```bash
$ machinen exec agent -- apt-get install -y python3
$ machinen exec agent -- ls /opt
```

## Pages

- [Landing](https://machinen.dev/index.md): Hero pitch, install, and side-by-side SDK/CLI for every feature.

## Reference

- [README](https://github.com/redwoodjs/machinen.dev/blob/main/README.md): Install, quickstart (bake / boot / handoff), fork, and runtime API.
- [Repository](https://github.com/redwoodjs/machinen.dev): Marketing site source. Runtime source is not yet public.
